title: IR - Western Rails
description: Immersive Railroading Pack that adds a variety of North American equipment.
body:
**This pack only works with the Immersive Railroading mod.**
Western Rails adds a variety of North American equipment to Immersive Railroading.
It includes:
- Alco RS-3
- Alco RSD-4/5
- Alco RSD-15
- Baldwin VO-1000
- EMD GP-35
- EMD SW1
- EMD MRS-1
- Union Pacific TTT-63
- Union Pacific Standard C-57
- Nevada Northern 40
- Central Pacific "Jupiter"
- Budd Lightweight Cars
- West Pointe Heavyweight Cars
- PSCC Orecar
